problem id: 3296c5b5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00000110 -> 01011111
  00110110 -> 01011100
  10001010 -> 00010111
  10001000 -> 01110111
  11101001 -> 01000001
  11110111 -> 01100001
  00110011 -> 10101100
  10111011 -> 00100101
  01000000 -> 11111011
  11111100 -> 10110001

query: 00110010
predicted answer: 10011100
